buildName: COMPANY ACTIVITY + UNIVERSAL MAP CARD DATA FIX
serverBehavior: server.cjs serves root app files and does not prefer stale dist/index.html
latestImportantFixes: Company Activity panel uses the approved large logo-left card layout
Company Activity card shows company logo/name, online guards, total guards, jobs in motion, and jobs completed
Platform Admin Leaflet map markers now open image/detail-rich universal cards instead of thin text-only tooltips
Admin, Agency, Guard, and Client map cards use the same compact professional universal card markup
Guard cards show company, guard name, guard image when present, and current address
Client/property cards show client, property name, property image when present, and address
Preserves v4.0.29 single source badge lock and all previous marketplace flow fixes
sql: No new SQL required. Existing RUN_ONCE_V422_PROOF_UPLOAD_RLS_FIX.sql remains included for proof-upload RLS if needed.
